title: RELEASE_NOTES.md: automatically update changelog on new releases
body: We already generate the changelog when cutting a new release, but updating RELEASE_NOTES.md seems to be done manually (mostly by @mheon) at the moment. This is a good candidate for automation.

comments.body: To be clear RELEASE_NOTES.md is updated but only on the release branch, we need automation to merge it back into main after the release.
